prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 024
Filename: 024_defiance.png
Revision: v002
Purpose: Create Chloe's canonical Defiance reference.
Targeted revision: Increase emotional certainty. Do not increase anger, aggression, volume, clenched teeth, or theatrical rage. Communicate: I know exactly who I am. I survived. I am no longer asking permission. You cannot erase me. The expression should feel quietly immovable, as though Chloe has already made her decision.
Preserve: facial identity, lighting, framing, skin, freckles, hair, posture, body proportions, mature age, realism.
Prompt library guidance: The camera documents Chloe rather than admiring her. Avoid glamour framing. Avoid fashion-editorial composition. Frame Chloe as a protagonist rather than a model. Emotion should originate from the eyes, breathing, posture, and intention before facial exaggeration.
Locked references: Chloe Model v1, Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, and 024 v001 for continuity.
negative_prompt: Avoid increased anger, aggression, shouting, clenched teeth, rage, scowl, hero pose, glamour framing, fashion-editorial composition, beauty-model posing, dramatic makeup, artificial skin, changed hair, theatrical expression, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical performance reference. Captures quiet resolve rather than aggression. Expression communicates certainty, resilience, and agency. Recommended as the master Defiance image for Chloe Model v1.
approval_directive: Asset 024 v002 approved as canonical Defiance performance master.
